evals.prompt: Add this person — pasted email signature: "Sarah Chen / Senior Engineer / Acme Inc / sarah@acme.com / @sarahchen on Slack".
evals.expected_output: A new person page at wiki/people/sarah-chen.md (work) or wiki/network/relationships/sarah-chen.md (personal), with name/role/company/email/slack populated, relationship inferred from context, last_contact set to today, and synopsis left for human review. Changelog entry appended.

evals.prompt: Capture this LinkedIn profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/janedoe/. She's joining as a cross-team partner on the order-platform project.
evals.expected_output: ingest-website cleans the profile; person schema applied with relationship: cross-team; tags include order-platform; the page links from wiki/projects/order-platform/team.md if a roster exists. If a Jane Doe already exists, surfaces the duplicate and offers person-update instead.

evals.prompt: Save this business card photo from yesterday's conference — Mark Rivera, founder of dataflow.io.
evals.expected_output: ingest-document with OCR extracts the card text; person schema applied; in personal variant, placed at wiki/network/relationships/mark-rivera.md with how_we_met set to the conference context. Cadence target asked or left blank for the user to set.
